since_last: 31% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.88%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.63% · Gold +0.27% · Nasdaq100 -1.99%. 31% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.88%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.88%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -11.17%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +4.49%, WDAY +4.45%, NOW +2.64%, SAP +2.51%, CRM +2.41%. Laggards: TER -11.17%, AMAT -10.02%, INTC -9.85%, AMBA -9.70%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.69% at $151.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
